hero.title: Discover the shops next door.
hero.subtitle: NearBuy connects neighborhood shops with their customers. Search a product, chat with the shopkeeper, pick it up in store.

how.title: How it works
how.step1Body: Find in seconds a product available in your neighborhood.
how.step2Body: Confirm availability and reserve by direct message.
how.step3Body: No delivery, no hidden fees — you collect your product in store.

footer.tagline: NearBuy — Local shopping, right next door.

deletion.intro: To delete your NearBuy account (customer or shopkeeper), fill out this form. You don't need to be signed in.
deletion.confirm: I confirm I want to permanently delete my account.
deletion.successBody: Your request has been recorded. Our team will process it within 30 days.
